executives.name: Birgit Steinborn
executives.background: First Deputy Chairwoman of the Supervisory Board. Chairwoman of the Central Works Council of Siemens AG.

tenure_dates.title: Chairwoman of the Central Works Council

executives.name: Judith Wiese
executives.background: Judith Wiese is Chief People and Sustainability Officer (CPSO) and a member of the Managing Board. She joined Siemens in 2020 from Mars Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Managing Board, Chief People and Sustainability Officer, Labor Director

executives.name: Matthias Rebellius
executives.background: Matthias Rebellius is CEO of Smart Infrastructure and a member of the Managing Board. He has been with Siemens since 1988 in various management positions.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Managing Board; CEO of Smart Infrastructure

executives.name: Nathalie von Siemens
executives.background: Former Managing Director and spokesperson of the Board of Siemens Stiftung.

executives.name: Paulo Ruiz
executives.background: Paulo Ruiz is President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector. He was appointed to this role in 2022. He joined Eaton in 2019 as President of the Hydraulics Group. Prior to Eaton, he spent more than 18 years with Siemens.

board_of_directors.name: Jim Hagemann Snabe
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Supervisory Board of Siemens AG. Former Co-CEO of SAP SE. He serves on various boards including Northvolt AB.

board_of_directors.name: Judith Wiese
board_of_directors.background: Judith Wiese is Chief People and Sustainability Officer (CPSO) and a member of the Managing Board. She joined Siemens in 2020 from Mars Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Managing Board, Chief People and Sustainability Officer, Labor Director
